reviews.author: R B
reviews.reviewBody: The cookies were soo delicious and filling! I have nearly finished half the box and I only bought them two days ago! I  think these will be great for Ramadan if I decide to fast to help keep my milk supply up!

reviews.author: mariahzaini
reviews.reviewBody: Sweet, soft oat cookies that are seriously addictive—and perfect for a lactating mum who’s constantly hungry. I say this from experience: these were my go-to snack from the early postpartum days right through to a year later. The cookies are generously sized, so one was usually enough to keep me full. I also genuinely felt they helped support my milk production. Will definitely order more!!

reviews.author: Halimah Nawaz
reviews.reviewBody: Amazing cookies! These cookies taste incredible and helped boost my milk supply. I was sure I would have to stop breastfeeding because my supply was declining but these cookies helped me to increase my supply and I was able to continue to breastfeed for another few months until I decided to stop myself

reviews.author: Mrs MIM
reviews.reviewBody: I was gifted these lactation cookies right after giving birth, and honestly they were amazing. Not only were they so delicious, but I genuinely noticed a difference in my milk supply while eating them. They were such a comforting treat during those early postpartum days and made me feel really supported as a new mum. You can tell they’re made with care and love. I’d highly recommend them to any breastfeeding mum 🤍
